no-restricted-syntax.message: The tenantScoped $extends client wraps every operation in its own implicit transaction — $transaction on it is NOT atomic (locks don't hold across statements). Use withTenantTx() from src/shared/db-tx instead. (adminPrisma is a plain client since ADR 0004 and is fine.)
tenantScoped(...).$transaction is not atomic — use withTenantTx() from src/shared/db-tx.

paths.name: @madar/db
paths.message: Tenant-realm code must use tenantScoped(tenantId) only. adminPrisma bypasses RLS and basePrisma sets no session vars; both are cross-realm leaks here. Shared cross-realm work lives in apps/api/src/payment-proofs-shared.

paths.name: @madar/db
paths.message: Admin-realm code must use adminPrisma only. Cross-realm calls are forbidden (CLAUDE.md). Shared cross-realm work lives in apps/api/src/payment-proofs-shared.
